subcodes.first_line: The Most Great, Most Holy Tablet was sent down aforetime from the heaven of the Divine Will, and this is once again revealed that thou mayest render thanks unto thy Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: از قبل لوح امنع اقدس از سماء اراده ربانی نازل و ارسال شد و هذه مره اخری لتشکر ربک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @wisdom [hikmat]
